name: Escape to the Chateau DIY
overview: Many Brits have moved to France to buy crumbling French chateaus to renovate into stunning homes. This series follows their progress and sees them try to use their homes as a business for events, etc. In 2021, the program was renamed as "Chateau DIY".

trailers.title: TRAILER | Escape to the Chateau: DIY | Weekdays at 4pm Channel 4
